
```{r load-data-125403}



```


html_title <- paste0('### Crossing ', my_site, ' - ', my_overview_info %>% pull(road_name), ' - ', my_overview_info %>% pull(stream_name))


## Results


The analysis phase is summarized in Table \@ref(tab:cost-est)

```{r cost_est}
source('R/cost-estimates.R')

tab_cost_est %>% 
  kable(caption = 'Modelled upstream habitat estimate and cost benefit.',
        escape = T) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling(c("condensed"), full_width = T, font_size = 11) %>% 
  kableExtra::scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "500px")

```
